description: Complex beneficial ownership involving a five-layer holding company structure with indirect ownership chain traced to ultimate beneficial owners
parsed_text:
KYC / BENEFICIAL OWNERSHIP — COMPLEX ENTITY PROFILE
Legal Entity Name: Stratford Global Holdings Inc
Customer Type: Business
EIN: XX-XXX9901
State of Incorporation: Delaware
Principal Business Address: 1209 Orange Street, Wilmington, DE 19801, USA
Phone: (302) 555-0122   Email: legal@stratfordglobal.example
Business Activity: Holding company — passive investment in subsidiary operating companies
Source of Funds: Dividend distributions from subsidiaries, intercompany management fees
Expected Monthly Activity: $2,300,000

OWNERSHIP CHAIN — FIVE LAYERS
Layer 1 (Account Entity): Stratford Global Holdings Inc (Delaware, USA)
Layer 2: 100% owned by Stratford International Group Ltd (Cayman Islands — KY-REG-XXXX2201)
Layer 3: Stratford International Group Ltd is 55% owned by Kenfield Asset Management LP (British Virgin Islands — BVI-XXXX7703)
Layer 4: Kenfield Asset Management LP is 70% owned by Kenfield Capital Partners SA (Luxembourg — LU-XXXX4418)
Layer 5: Kenfield Capital Partners SA is owned by two natural persons:
  - Alexander Roth: 60% (indirect effective ownership in Stratford Global Holdings: approx 23.1%)
  - Franziska Werner: 40% (indirect effective ownership in Stratford Global Holdings: approx 15.4%)

Remainder Layer 2–3: 45% of Stratford International Group Ltd is publicly traded on the Luxembourg Stock Exchange (LU-ISIN-XXXXXXX003).

ULTIMATE BENEFICIAL OWNERS (UBOs) — IDENTIFIED
Alexander Roth — indirect ownership 23.1% (above 25% threshold not met, but identified per enhanced policy for complex structures)
Franziska Werner — indirect ownership 15.4%
Control Person: Stephen Mulvaney, CEO, Stratford Global Holdings Inc

ID DOCUMENTS COLLECTED
Alexander Roth — Passport: DE-XXXX3309 (Germany), Exp: 2028-05-15
Franziska Werner — Passport: DE-XXXX8812 (Germany), Exp: 2027-11-30
Stephen Mulvaney — Driver License: DL-DE-XX6622, Exp: 2026-08-20

SCREENING RESULTS
OFAC / SDN: Clear for all UBOs, control person, and all intermediate entities.
EU Consolidated Sanctions: Clear.
Cayman / BVI / Luxembourg AML Framework Review: All intermediate jurisdictions assessed. BVI and Cayman flagged as enhanced-monitoring jurisdictions per internal policy. Mitigation: regulated funds administrators documented for each entity.
PEP Check: No PEP associations for Alexander Roth, Franziska Werner, or Stephen Mulvaney.
Adverse Media: No adverse media for UBOs or intermediate entities.

RISK ASSESSMENT
EDD Trigger: Yes — complex multi-jurisdictional holding structure and presence of offshore intermediate entities.
CDD Level: Enhanced
Risk Rating: High
PEP Status: No
Compliance Notes: Legal entity ownership chart prepared by external law firm (Maynard & Crew LLP, Wilmington). UBO trace completed to natural-person level. Senior compliance officer approval granted.
Review Date: 2025-12-10   Reviewer: Oliver Bassett

expected_json.occupation_or_business: Holding company — passive investment in subsidiary operating companies
expected_json.source_of_funds: Dividend distributions from subsidiaries, intercompany management fees
